query: SK Hynix ADR Nasdaq listing SKHY first trading date July 2026 latest news, pricing date, roadshow status, SEC review as of late June 2026. Is July 10 still the expected trading date? Any reports of delay or schedule slippage?
answer:
## Summary

**The July 10 trading date held — there was no delay.** SK Hynix successfully debuted on Nasdaq on Friday, July 10, 2026, exactly as originally targeted.

Key facts as of today (July 13, 2026):
- **Pricing date:** Thursday, July 9, 2026 — ADRs priced at **$149** each
- **Amount raised:** **$26.5 billion** (177.9 million ADRs) — the largest-ever U.S. share sale by a foreign company, topping Alibaba's 2014 IPO
- **Debut (July 10):** Opened ~$170, closed at **$168.01, up ~13%**
- **Demand:** Offering was **>7x oversubscribed**
- **Ticker:** Traded as **SKHYV** during initial conditional trading; switched to permanent **SKHY** with regular-way trading starting **today, Tuesday July 13**
- **Roadshow/SEC:** Both fully resolved by the July 9 pricing (F-1/A effective); the "tentative, subject to change" language from the June 24 filing was cleared

The only deviation from the earlier plan was the final size — proceeds came in at $26.5B (at $149/ADR) versus the initial ~$29B target — **not the timing**. No reports of delay or schedule slippage were found.

sources.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
sources.snippet: SK Hynix rose 13% in its first day of trading on Nasdaq, closing at $168.01. Trading under SKHYV, switching to SKHY as of Tuesday.

sources.title: South Korea's biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
sources.snippet: SK Hynix said it expects to start trading on July 10, but added that the dates were tentative and subject to change. Plans to issue 17.79 million new shares valued at 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion).

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq debut: $26.5 billion ADR listing sets record
sources.snippet: Priced at $149 apiece on Thursday, the offering comprised 177.9 million ADRs, raising $26.5 billion, the largest U.S. share sale ever by a foreign company.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR offering more than 7 times oversubscribed
sources.snippet: Orders exceeded seven times the available shares ahead of Friday's Nasdaq debut.

sources.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion in Biggest Foreign Debut in US
sources.snippet: SK Hynix priced its US share offering at $149 apiece, raising $26.5 billion.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq debut: ADR opens at $170 after $26.5B offering
sources.snippet: ADRs opened at $170 per share — a 14% gain above the $149 offering price. Until regular-way trading begins July 13, the ADRs trade as SKHYV.

sources.title: SK hynix (SKHY) Stock Price & Overview
sources.snippet: Market Cap 1.06T; IPO Price 149.00; Open 170.43; Day's Range 166.20-177.00.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq ADR Listing: Historical $28B Offering Set on July 10, 2026
sources.snippet: Per a regulatory filing published July 6, 2026, SK Hynix set to debut on Nasdaq Global Select Market July 10, 2026.

sources.title: SK Hynix Lists ADRs on Nasdaq, Elevating Global Status
sources.snippet: Official press release confirming completion of the ADR listing on Nasdaq.
